title: rubus koehleri var. angulosus
intro: Rubus koehleri var. angulosus, also known as the Korean black raspberry or black thorn, is a variant of the Rubus koehleri plant species, characterized by its edible fruits and medicinal properties. The plant is rich in antioxidants, flavonoids, and anthocyanins, which are believed to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Rubus koehleri var. angulosus include its potential to support cardiovascular health, improve cognitive function, and exhibit anti-cancer properties. The plant can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to support overall health and well-being.
